title: IPMAT Exam Pattern 2026 Overview

detail.title: IPMAT Exam Pattern 2026 Overview
detail.short_info: IPMAT Exam Pattern 2026 consists of three sections, including Quantitative Ability (MCQs), Quantitative Ability (SA), and Verbal Ability (MCQs). Check complete exam structure, marking scheme, and latest pattern details for IIM Indore and IIM Rohtak.

content.text: IPMAT Exam Pattern 2026 for IIM Indore and IIM Rohtak is a computer-based aptitude test that serves as the gateway to the prestigious five-year Integrated Programme in Management (IPM). It evaluates Class 12 students on Quantitative Aptitude, Verbal Ability, and (for Rohtak) Logical Reasoning skills through a structured format with sectional time limits.

Understanding the exact IPMAT exam pattern 2026 -including the number of questions, marking scheme, time allocation, and syllabus differences between IIM Indore and IIM Rohtak -helps aspirants prepare strategically, manage time effectively, and improve their chances of securing admission to these top IIMs. The exam is designed for students from any stream (Science, Commerce, or Arts) who have completed or are appearing for Class 12.

sections.heading: IPMAT Exam Pattern 2026 for IIM Indore
IPMAT Exam Pattern 2026 for IIM Rohtak
Quantitative Ability Syllabus for IPMAT IIM Indore

rows: Successive Division, Divisibility, Finding Unit Digit, Factorial, HCF & LCM, Surds & Indices, Simplification, Properties of a Number, Remainder, Concept of Factor
Inequalities, Algebraic Formulae, Logarithm, Quadratic Equations, Linear Equations, Functions & Graphs
Coordinate Geometry, Circle, Basics of Geometry, Triangles, Quadrilaterals, Polygons, Lines, Angles, Mensuration, Height & Distance
Profit Loss & Discount, Average, Problems on Age, Percentage, Partnership, Boats & Streams, Ratio & Proportion, Time & Work, Mixture & Allegations, Time, Speed & Distance
Set theory, Integration & Differentiation, Permutation & Combination, Determinants, Probability, Sequence & Series, Determinants, Data Interpretation, Vectors
Word Usage, One Word Substitution, Foreign Words, Idioms & Phrases, Antonyms, Odd one out, Synonyms, Spelling Errors

Conjunctions, Figures of Speech, Prepositions, Verb, Adverb, Direct & Indirect Speech, Pronoun, Phrasal Verbs, Etymology & Roots, Noun, Articles, Tenses, Active Voice, Passive Voice, Deductive Reasoning, Subject-Verb Agreement
Error Spotting, Para jumbles, Sentence Completion, Fill in the blanks, Sentence Improvement, Analogies
Synonym & Antonym (the meaning of a particular word used in the passage), Inference-based questions, Assumption-based questions

sections.heading: Quantitative Ability for IPMAT IIM Rohtak

rows: Number systems, Common graphs & charts, Data Interpretation, Mixtures and Allegations, Distance, Time, and Work, Averages, Quantitative reasoning, Geometry, Profit & Loss, Simple Equations, Percentages, Quadratic Equations, Binomial Theorem, Mensuration, Permutation & Combination, Ratio & Proportion, Trigonometry, Set Theory, Problems on Ages, Logarithms

sections.heading: IPMAT Logical Reasoning for IIM Rohtak

rows: Logical Sequence & Series, Coding, Arrangements, Blood Relations, Input & Output, Binary Logic
Games & Tournaments, Cubes & Visual Puzzles, Word Problems, Sequencing, Grid Puzzles, Linear & Circular Seating Arrangements
Critical Reasoning, Statements, Conclusions, Syllogisms, True or False

sections.heading: Verbal Ability Syllabus for IPMAT IIM Rohtak

rows: Synonyms, Antonyms, Correct Usage of Words & Phrases
Reading Comprehension, Inference-based Passages, Logical Consistency
Prepositions, Conjunctions, Tenses, Modifiers & Parallelism, Noun & Pronoun Errors
Sentence Rearrangement, Sentence Correction, Sentence Completion
